title: platymiscium pubescens
intro: Platymiscium pubescens, also known as Angelim-vermelho or Red Angelim, is a type of tree native to the Amazon rainforest. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Platymiscium pubescens include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic and antifungal agent. Herbal preparations of Platymiscium pubescens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
